iterations.theme: Trumpov utjecaj na kripto, regulatorni krajolik i dinamika tržišta

sections.subtitle: Uvod u razgovor: Filip Šaravanja i njegov put kroz kripto svijet
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj predstavlja Filipa Šaravanja, ističući njegovu bogatu karijeru u financijskom i kripto sektoru.
sections.content: Voditelj portala Cryptoverse.hr s ponosom je predstavio svog gosta, **Filipa Šaravanja**, istaknutu figuru u svijetu digitalne imovine. Filipova karijera obuhvaća raznolike uloge, od voditelja odjela digitalne imovine u Erkeshu i suosnivača Pazara, do trenutne pozicije voditelja regulatornih poslova u Merkuriju. Posebno je naglašena njegova prethodna uloga koordinatora inovacijskog huba u HANFA-i, hrvatskom financijskom regulatoru, što ga čini iznimno relevantnim sugovornikom za teme vezane uz regulaciju i tržište kriptovaluta.
sections.subtitle_en: Introduction to the conversation: Filip Šaravanja and his path through the crypto world
sections.screenshot_description_en: The Host introduces Filip Šaravanja, highlighting his extensive career in the financial and crypto sector.
sections.content_en: The head of the Cryptoverse.hr portal proudly presented his guest, **Filip Šaravanja**, a prominent figure in the world of digital assets. Filip's career encompasses diverse roles, from head of the digital assets department at Erkeshu and co-founder of Pazar, to the current position of head of regulatory affairs at Merkuriju. His previous role as coordinator of the innovation hub at HANFA-i, the Croatian financial regulator, was particularly emphasized, which makes him an extremely relevant interlocutor for topics related to regulation and the cryptocurrency market.

sections.subtitle: Trumpov MIM token: Fenomen koji je uzdrmao kripto tržište
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja analizira iznenadni uspon Trumpovog MIM tokena i njegov utjecaj na tržište.
sections.content: Razgovor je započeo analizom **Trumpovog MIM tokena**, nove zvijezde na kripto nebu koja je izazvala značajnu pažnju. Voditelj je istaknuo kako je token u samo jednom danu navodno donio milijarde dolara novom-starom američkom predsjedniku, s procjenama da je njegova imovina peterostruko uvećana. Filip Šaravanja potvrdio je značajan porast imovine 'na papiru', ali je postavio pitanje likvidnosti i mogućnosti prodaje. Istaknuo je da je Donald Trump očito želio biti u centru pozornosti te da je token nedvojbeno podigao 'značajnu prašinu' po pitanju volumena, brzine rasta i medijske prisutnosti. Filip je naglasio da je Trump 'pogodio nišu' s jednostavnim meme tokenom, što ga je iznenadilo svojom oštrinom i brzinom rasta, nazivajući ga 'najbrže rastućim tokenom u povijesti'.
sections.subtitle_en: Trump's MIM token: A phenomenon that shook the crypto market
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja analyzes the sudden rise of Trump's MIM token and its impact on the market.
sections.content_en: The conversation began with an analysis of **Trump's MIM token**, a new star in the crypto sky that has attracted significant attention. The host pointed out that the token allegedly brought billions of dollars to the new-old American president in just one day, with estimates that his assets increased fivefold. Filip Šaravanja confirmed a significant increase in assets 'on paper', but raised the question of liquidity and the possibility of sale. He pointed out that Donald Trump obviously wanted to be in the spotlight and that the token undoubtedly raised 'significant dust' regarding volume, growth speed, and media presence. Filip emphasized that Trump 'hit the niche' with a simple meme token, which surprised him with its sharpness and growth speed, calling it 'the fastest growing token in history'.

sections.subtitle: Etičke dileme i regulatorni izazovi političkih meme coina
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja govori o etičkim i pravnim aspektima Trumpovog tokena, spominjući MiCA regulativu.
sections.content: Voditelj je postavio pitanje etičkih i moralnih implikacija ovakvog poteza, kao i mogućih sudskih procesa. Filip Šaravanja opisao je lansiranje tokena kao **'dosta hrabar potez'** za političara, ističući da se time stavlja ime na kocku, jer će dio ljudi sigurno izgubiti novac. Smatra da je to nova vrsta 'plebiscita' ili glasanja, gdje ljudi kupuju token jer preferiraju Trumpa. Ipak, Filip je naglasio da Trumpov MIM token 'nije izdan u skladu s postojećom regulativom' barem ne na europskom tlu, referirajući se na **MiCA regulativu**. Postavio je retoričko pitanje hoće li itko pozvati Trumpa na odgovornost zbog oglašavanja tokena europskom retailu, s obzirom na njegovu poziciju predsjednika SAD-a i pravila koja su stupila na snagu početkom godine.
sections.subtitle_en: Ethical dilemmas and regulatory challenges of political meme coins
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja speaks about the ethical and legal aspects of Trump's token, mentioning the MiCA regulation.
sections.content_en: The host asked the question of the ethical and moral implications of such a move, as well as possible legal processes. Filip Šaravanja described the launch of the token as **'quite a brave move'** for a politician, emphasizing that it puts one's name on the line, because some people will surely lose money. He believes that this is a new type of 'plebiscite' or voting, where people buy the token because they prefer Trump. However, Filip emphasized that Trump's MIM token 'is not issued in accordance with existing regulation' at least not on European soil, referring to the **MiCA regulation**. He posed the rhetorical question of whether anyone will hold Trump accountable for advertising the token to European retail, given his position as President of the USA and the rules that came into force at the beginning of the year.

sections.subtitle: Kripto i korupcija: Pseudo-anonimnost kao dvosjekli mač
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja objašnjava kako blockchain tehnologija može učiniti korupciju transparentnijom.
sections.content: Voditelj je dalje istražio problem korupcije, sugerirajući da takav token otvara vrata neetičnim praksama. Postavio je hipotetički scenarij u kojem bi netko mogao kupiti Trumpov token u zamjenu za političku uslugu, koristeći DEX-ove za anonimnost. Filip Šaravanja je odgovorio da su većina blockchain sustava **'pseudo-anonimni, ne anonimni'**. Objasnio je da bi takva korupcija bila 'najtransparentnija korupcija ikada', jer bi trajni zapis na blockchainu kad-tad mogao povezati novčanik s osobom, otkrivajući koruptivno ponašanje. Iako se netko može sakriti iza Solana ekosustava i kupovati s novčanika koje je teže povezati, Filip vjeruje da bi trag ostao.
sections.subtitle_en: Crypto and corruption: Pseudo-anonymity as a double-edged sword
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja explains how blockchain technology can make corruption more transparent.
sections.content_en: The host further explored the problem of corruption, suggesting that such a token opens the door to unethical practices. He posed a hypothetical scenario in which someone could buy Trump's token in exchange for a political service, using DEXs for anonymity. Filip Šaravanja responded that most blockchain systems are **'pseudo-anonymous, not anonymous'**. He explained that such corruption would be 'the most transparent corruption ever', because a permanent record on the blockchain could eventually connect the wallet to the person, revealing corrupt behavior. Although someone can hide behind the Solana ecosystem and buy with wallets that are harder to connect, Filip believes that a trace would remain.

sections.subtitle: Od 'Divljeg zapada' do transparentnosti: Kripto i sukob interesa
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja uspoređuje transparentnost kripto transakcija s tradicionalnim financijama, govoreći o sukobu interesa.
sections.content: Voditelj je povukao paralelu s DeFi poslom obitelji Trump, **World Liberty Financial**, i investicijom Justina Suna, osnivača Trona, koji je optužen za korupciju od strane SEC-a. Postavio je pitanje je li to kupovanje utjecaja i protekcije. Filip Šaravanja je naglasio da bi se svaki sukob interesa trebao formalno objelodaniti korisnicima. Smatra da je kripto, unatoč tome što je 'divlje tržište', transparentniji od tradicionalnih financija. Istaknuo je da se 'sve vidi on-chain' – novčanici povezani s Justinom Sunom uložili su u projekt, što omogućuje javnosti da procijeni situaciju. Filip je usporedio to s tradicionalnim poslovima prošlog predsjednika, gdje je dokumentacija bila skrivena i nejasna, dok je u kriptu sve transparentno. Zaključio je da se klatno u SAD-u pomiče iz hiperreguliranosti prema **liberalnijem smjeru**, što bi moglo dovesti do više prevara, ali i do toga da tržište samo 'očisti' takve sheme.
sections.subtitle_en: From 'Wild West' to transparency: Crypto and conflict of interest
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja compares the transparency of crypto transactions with traditional finances, speaking about conflict of interest.
sections.content_en: The host drew a parallel with the Trump family's DeFi business, **World Liberty Financial**, and the investment of Justin Sun, founder of Tron, who is accused of corruption by the SEC. He raised the question of whether this is buying influence and protection. Filip Šaravanja emphasized that every conflict of interest should be formally disclosed to users. He believes that crypto, despite being a 'wild market', is more transparent than traditional finance. He pointed out that 'everything is visible on-chain' – wallets connected to Justin Sun invested in the project, which allows the public to assess the situation. Filip compared this to the traditional businesses of the previous president, where documentation was hidden and unclear, while in crypto everything is transparent. He concluded that the pendulum in the USA is moving from hyper-regulation towards a **more liberal direction**, which could lead to more scams, but also to the market itself 'cleaning up' such schemes.

sections.subtitle: Meme coini: Globalni kasino za mlađe generacije ili ozbiljna investicija?
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja objašnjava svoju percepciju meme coina kao 'globalnog kasina' za mlađe generacije.
sections.content: Voditelj je pitao jesu li meme coini postali ozbiljna investicijska kategorija i imaju li pozitivnih aspekata. Filip Šaravanja je iskreno priznao da se 'osjeća prestar' da bi u potpunosti razumio meme coine. Dok je prije nekoliko godina razumio neke poput Dodgea i Shiba Inua, trenutna situacija sa Solanom i Pump Funom mu je 'izašla izvan okvira'. Opisao je to kao **'globalni kasino'** za mlađu generaciju, generaciju Z, gdje se sve odvija brzo i s malo kočnica, kao 'zero sum game'. Iako su mu neki memovi bili zanimljivi, smatra da je 'tolika inflacija toga na tržištu' da ne može shvatiti poruku koju nose, ističući da ih je previše za praćenje.
sections.subtitle_en: Meme coins: Global casino for younger generations or serious investment?
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja explains his perception of meme coins as a 'global casino' for younger generations.
sections.content_en: The host asked if meme coins have become a serious investment category and if they have positive aspects. Filip Šaravanja honestly admitted that he 'feels too old' to fully understand meme coins. While a few years ago he understood some like Dodge and Shiba Inu, the current situation with Solana and Pump Fun has 'gone beyond his scope'. He described it as a **'global casino'** for the younger generation, Generation Z, where everything happens quickly and with few brakes, like a 'zero sum game'. Although some memes were interesting to him, he believes that 'there is such an inflation of that on the market' that he cannot understand the message they carry, pointing out that there are too many of them to follow.

sections.subtitle: Politički meme coini i američka deregulacija: Hoće li SAD postati kripto lider?
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja razmatra budućnost političkih meme coina i potencijalnu deregulaciju američkog kripto tržišta.
sections.content: Voditelj je predvidio poplavu 'fan baziranih' meme coina, uključujući one političara. Filip Šaravanja se složio, ističući da je Trumpov potez hrabar i da bi mogao potaknuti druge političare da lansiraju vlastite tokene. Razgovor se zatim prebacio na regulatorni krajolik u SAD-u. Filip je izrazio sumnju da će doći do potpune deregulacije, unatoč liberalizaciji. Smatra da će financijski establishment u Americi, iako podržava liberalizaciju, neće dopustiti 'potpuni divlji zapad'. Predviđa da će SAD, kao najjače i najzanimljivije tržište, ako provede liberalizaciju, stvoriti **'trapul'** za europska i ostala regulirana tržišta, privlačeći kapital i projekte. Naglasio je da će se novac uvijek moći 'ombordati' offshore ili u Americi, čak i ako se tokeni zabrane u Europi.
sections.subtitle_en: Political meme coins and American deregulation: Will the USA become a crypto leader?
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja considers the future of political meme coins and the potential deregulation of the American crypto market.
sections.content_en: The host predicted a flood of 'fan-based' meme coins, including those of politicians. Filip Šaravanja agreed, pointing out that Trump's move is brave and that it could encourage other politicians to launch their own tokens. The conversation then shifted to the regulatory landscape in the USA. Filip expressed doubt that there would be complete deregulation, despite liberalization. He believes that the financial establishment in America, although it supports liberalization, will not allow a 'complete wild west'. He predicts that the USA, as the strongest and most interesting market, if it implements liberalization, will create a **'trap'** for European and other regulated markets, attracting capital and projects. He emphasized that money will always be able to be 'onboarded' offshore or in America, even if tokens are banned in Europe.

sections.subtitle: SEC i Gary Gensler: Politička igra koja je oblikovala kripto industriju
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja analizira ulogu Garyja Genslera u SEC-u i njegov utjecaj na politizaciju kripto industrije u SAD-u.
sections.content: Voditelj je postavio pitanje o ulozi SEC-a i može li predsjednikov token zaobići registraciju. Filip Šaravanja je sugerirao da su meme coini, poput Trumpovog, djelomično nastali kao odgovor na ponašanje SEC-a prema legitimnim projektima. Istaknuo je da su mnogi ICO-i iz 2017. bili legitimni, a projekti poput Ethereuma i Solane nisu iznevjerili ulagače, no ipak su završili pod lupom SEC-a. Filip je pohvalio **Garyja Genslera** zbog njegovog dubokog razumijevanja blockchaina, što je vidljivo iz njegovih predavanja na MIT-u. Međutim, kritizirao je Genslerov pristup koji je 'odvukao u sferu politike' i otjerao cijelu kripto industriju u Americi na 'zadnje noge', okrećući je protiv stranke koja ga je postavila. Filip vjeruje da je Gensler, svjesno ili nesvjesno, učinio puno toga da kripto u Americi postane političko pitanje. Predviđa da bi s novim vodstvom SEC-a moglo doći do **nagodbi** u tužbama protiv tvrtki poput Ripplea i Coinbasea, umjesto potpunog povlačenja tužbi.
sections.subtitle_en: SEC and Gary Gensler: A political game that shaped the crypto industry
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja analyzes the role of Gary Gensler in the SEC and his influence on the politicization of the crypto industry in the USA.
sections.content_en: The host asked a question about the role of the SEC and whether the president's token could bypass registration. Filip Šaravanja suggested that meme coins, like Trump's, partially emerged as a response to the SEC's behavior towards legitimate projects. He pointed out that many ICOs from 2017 were legitimate, and projects like Ethereum and Solana did not disappoint investors, yet they still ended up under the SEC's scrutiny. Filip praised **Gary Gensler** for his deep understanding of blockchain, which is evident from his lectures at MIT. However, he criticized Gensler's approach which 'dragged it into the sphere of politics' and drove the entire crypto industry in America 'to its last legs', turning it against the party that appointed him. Filip believes that Gensler, consciously or unconsciously, did a lot to make crypto in America a political issue. He predicts that with new SEC leadership, there could be **settlements** in lawsuits against companies like Ripple and Coinbase, instead of a complete withdrawal of lawsuits.

sections.subtitle: Kripto ETF-ovi: Izazovi širenja izvan Bitcoina i Ethereuma
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja objašnjava složene uvjete za odobravanje kripto ETF-ova izvan Bitcoina i Ethereuma.
sections.content: Voditelj je pitao o budućnosti ETF-ova za druge kriptovalute osim Bitcoina i Ethereuma, spominjući SHIB, BONK, pa čak i Trumpov token. Filip Šaravanja je objasnio da problem s ETF-ovima nije toliko u naravi kripta, već u postojanju **dovoljno dubokog i likvidnog sekundarnog tržišta** za pojedinu imovinu. Naglasio je da je potrebno osigurati kontrolu zlouporabe tržišta i povlaštenih informacija, te da temeljna imovina mora imati dovoljno dubok futures i opcijski market kako bi se izdavatelji ETF-ova mogli hedžirati. Izrazio je sumnju da mnogi spomenuti altcoini mogu tako brzo zadovoljiti te kriterije. Zaključio je da se cijela infrastruktura mora razviti oko pojedine klase imovine prije nego što se ona može zapakirati u exchange traded fund.
sections.subtitle_en: Crypto ETFs: Challenges of expansion beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja explains the complex conditions for approving crypto ETFs beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum.
sections.content_en: The host asked about the future of ETFs for other cryptocurrencies besides Bitcoin and Ethereum, mentioning SHIB, BONK, and even Trump's token. Filip Šaravanja explained that the problem with ETFs is not so much in the nature of crypto, but in the existence of a **sufficiently deep and liquid secondary market** for a particular asset. He emphasized that it is necessary to ensure control of market abuse and insider information, and that the underlying asset must have a sufficiently deep futures and options market so that ETF issuers can hedge. He expressed doubt that many of the mentioned altcoins can meet these criteria so quickly. He concluded that the entire infrastructure must develop around a particular asset class before it can be packaged into an exchange traded fund.

sections.subtitle: Trumpova kripto strategija: Tišina na inauguraciji, ali jasan smjer za SAD
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja objašnjava zašto Trump nije spominjao kripto na inauguraciji i predviđa američko vodstvo u kripto industriji.
sections.content: Voditelj je primijetio da Trump nije spominjao kripto tijekom svoje inauguracije i pitao je li to razlog za razočaranje. Filip Šaravanja je izjavio da nije razočaran, smatrajući da je **politička poruka već poslana** nekoliko dana prije inauguracije kroz 'Crypto Ball' i lansiranje MIM tokena. Objasnio je da su globalno gledano, kripto i dalje niša, te da postoje bitnije teme za predsjednika SAD-a. Filip je istaknuo da su SAD iznenađujuće povezana država u smislu industrije, regulatora i kreatora politika, puno izravnije nego u Europi. Predviđa da će američka industrija biti 'jako brza u rađenju strategije kako da oni budu najjače kripto tržište na svijetu', u što je prilično uvjeren.
sections.subtitle_en: Trump's crypto strategy: Silence at the inauguration, but a clear direction for the USA
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja explains why Trump did not mention crypto at the inauguration and predicts American leadership in the crypto industry.
sections.content_en: The host noted that Trump did not mention crypto during his inauguration and asked if that was a reason for disappointment. Filip Šaravanja stated that he was not disappointed, considering that the **political message had already been sent** a few days before the inauguration through 'Crypto Ball' and the launch of the MIM token. He explained that, globally speaking, crypto is still a niche, and that there are more important topics for the US president. Filip pointed out that the US is a surprisingly connected country in terms of industry, regulators, and policymakers, much more directly than in Europe. He predicts that the American industry will be 'very quick in strategizing how they can be the strongest crypto market in the world,' of which he is quite convinced.

sections.subtitle: MiCA regulativa: 'Frankenstein' europskog kripto zakonodavstva
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja kritizira MiCA regulativu, nazivajući je 'Frankensteinom' zbog njezine složenosti i nedostatka jasnoće.
sections.content: Razgovor se prebacio na europsku **MiCA regulativu**, koja je stupila na snagu. Voditelj je pitao je li Filip zadovoljan s njom, spominjući da je Hrvatska tražila odgodu. Filip Šaravanja je pojasnio da je odgoda bila omogućena svim državama i da ju je većina iskoristila. Izrazio je **nezadovoljstvo s MiCA-om**, opisujući je kao 'Frankensteina od regulative'. Kritizirao je sporost procesa, kompromise i lobiranja koja su dovela do brojnih tehničkih grešaka i nejasnoća. Posebno je istaknuo da MiCA nije dovoljno jasno isključila inovativna područja poput DeFi-ja i NFT-ova, stvarajući 'pravnu nesigurnost' i 'kakofoniju'. Filip je naglasio da MiCA nije riješila ključna pitanja poput definicije prenosivog vrijednosnog papira u EU, što je ostalo fragmentirano zbog različitih implementacija MIFID direktive u državama članicama. Zaključio je da će to dovesti do fragmentiranog tržišta i da će projekti, ako Amerika postane pravno sigurnija, otići iz Europe.
sections.subtitle_en: MiCA regulation: 'Frankenstein' of European crypto legislation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja criticizes MiCA regulation, calling it 'Frankenstein' due to its complexity and lack of clarity.
sections.content_en: The conversation shifted to the European **MiCA regulation**, which came into force. The host asked if Filip was satisfied with it, mentioning that Croatia had requested a postponement. Filip Šaravanja clarified that the postponement was enabled for all countries and that most of them had used it. He expressed **dissatisfaction with MiCA**, describing it as a 'Frankenstein of regulation'. He criticized the slowness of the process, compromises, and lobbying that led to numerous technical errors and ambiguities. He particularly pointed out that MiCA did not sufficiently clearly exclude innovative areas such as DeFi and NFTs, creating 'legal uncertainty' and 'cacophony'. Filip emphasized that MiCA did not resolve key issues such as the definition of a transferable security in the EU, which remained fragmented due to different implementations of the MIFID directive in member states. He concluded that this would lead to a fragmented market and that projects, if America becomes legally more secure, would leave Europe.

sections.subtitle: Kripto: Od niše entuzijasta do kompleksnog globalnog sustava vrijednosti
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja govori o evoluciji kripto svijesti i izazovima razumijevanja današnjeg kompleksnog tržišta.
sections.content: Voditelj je pitao o evoluciji svijesti o digitalnoj imovini i adopciji u proteklom desetljeću. Filip Šaravanja je objasnio da je prije deset godina kripto bio 'nišno područje puno entuzijasta', gdje se nadalo zaradi bez jasnog vremenskog okvira. Danas je, kaže, 'puno teže pratiti cijeli prostor' i razlučiti 'od šume, od buke' što se zapravo događa, jer se narativ mijenja svakih nekoliko tjedana. Istaknuo je da je jedini pravi 'use case' koji i dalje doživljava u financijskoj sferi **globalni sustav za istinsku namjeru**, odnosno prijenos vrijednosti. Filip vjeruje da se sve što se monetizira i završi u digitalnoj sferi može lakše prenositi i trgovati. Dotaknuo se i privatnosti, sugerirajući da bi 'zero-knowledge proof' mogao donijeti bolju privatnost nego što je sada, gdje se podacima trguje na dark webu.
sections.subtitle_en: Crypto: From a niche of enthusiasts to a complex global system of values
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja speaks about the evolution of crypto consciousness and the challenges of understanding today's complex market.
sections.content_en: The host asked about the evolution of awareness of digital assets and adoption in the past decade. Filip Šaravanja explained that ten years ago crypto was 'a niche area full of enthusiasts', where earnings were hoped for without a clear timeframe. Today, he says, it is 'much harder to follow the entire space' and discern 'from the forest, from the noise' what is actually happening, because the narrative changes every few weeks. He pointed out that the only true 'use case' he still experiences in the financial sphere is **a global system for true intent**, i.e., value transfer. Filip believes that everything that is monetized and ends up in the digital sphere can be more easily transferred and traded. He also touched upon privacy, suggesting that 'zero-knowledge proof' could bring better privacy than now, where data is traded on the dark web.

sections.subtitle: Retail investitori u kriptu: Prisutni, ali raspršeni u moru novih narativa
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja objašnjava kako su retail investitori prisutni na kripto tržištu, ali je njihov utjecaj manje vidljiv zbog širenja ekosustava.
sections.content: Voditelj je pitao o sudjelovanju malih ulagača (retail) u trenutnom bull runu, s obzirom na teorije da je on primarno guran institucionalnim kapitalom. Filip Šaravanja se nije složio s tom tvrdnjom. Objasnio je da je retailu sada puno dostupnije kupovati kripto, navodeći primjere poput **Revoluta**, gdje se kriptovalute mogu kupiti, primiti na wallet i slati. Istaknuo je da se retail investitori uključuju i putem brokerskih računa za kupnju ETF-ova. Filip smatra da je retail prisutan, ali da je njegov učinak manje vidljiv zbog 'puno više narativa, puno više tokena' i širenja tržišta na brojne nove chainove i L2 projekte poput Solane, Basea, Arbitruma i Optimizma. Zaključio je da je cijelo tržište postalo puno kompleksnije za praćenje, što otežava uvid u koncentraciju retail kapitala.
sections.subtitle_en: Retail investors in crypto: Present, but scattered in a sea of new narratives
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja explains how retail investors are present on the crypto market, but their influence is less visible due to the expansion of the ecosystem.
sections.content_en: The host asked about the participation of small investors (retail) in the current bull run, considering theories that it is primarily driven by institutional capital. Filip Šaravanja did not agree with that claim. He explained that it is now much more accessible for retail to buy crypto, citing examples like **Revolut**, where cryptocurrencies can be bought, received to a wallet, and sent. He pointed out that retail investors are also getting involved through brokerage accounts for buying ETFs. Filip believes that retail is present, but that its effect is less visible due to 'much more narrative, much more tokens' and the expansion of the market to numerous new chains and L2 projects like Solana, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism. He concluded that the entire market has become much more complex to monitor, which makes it difficult to gain insight into the concentration of retail capital.

sections.subtitle: Bitcoin na 700.000 dolara? Prognoze cijena i budućnost kripto ciklusa
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šaravanja komentira prognoze cijena Bitcoina, uključujući onu Larryja Finka, i iznosi svoje viđenje tržišnog ciklusa.
sections.content: Voditelj je pitao o prognozama cijena Bitcoina, spominjući izjavu **Larryja Finka** iz BlackRocka da bi Bitcoin mogao dosegnuti 700.000 dolara. Filip Šaravanja je primijetio da Fink, kao najveći kreator ETF-ova, ima jasan interes za promicanje Bitcoina. Iako nije odbacio mogućnost takve cijene, naglasio je da to ovisi o mnogim 'ako' faktorima poput destabilizacije fiat valuta i ekonomske nestabilnosti. Filip je izbjegao davanje konkretnih prognoza cijena, ali je rekao da vjeruje da su pred nama 'još jedan do dva lega gore' u ovom ciklusu. Izrazio je skepticizam prema teoriji 'super ciklusa', ali je također odbacio ideju da je ovo 'zadnji ciklus'. Zaključio je da je kripto tržište, s alternativnim ulaganjima i brojnim novim tokenima, postalo nepredvidivo u smislu gdje će likvidnost završiti.
sections.subtitle_en: Bitcoin to 700,000 dollars? Price forecasts and the future of the crypto cycle
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šaravanja comments on Bitcoin price predictions, including Larry Fink's, and presents his view of the market cycle.
sections.content_en: The host asked about Bitcoin price predictions, mentioning the statement by **Larry Fink** from BlackRock that Bitcoin could reach 700,000 dollars. Filip Šaravanja noted that Fink, as the largest creator of ETFs, has a clear interest in promoting Bitcoin. Although he did not dismiss the possibility of such a price, he emphasized that it depends on many 'if' factors such as the destabilization of fiat currencies and economic instability. Filip avoided giving concrete price predictions, but said he believes that 'one to two more legs up' are ahead of us in this cycle. He expressed skepticism towards the 'super cycle' theory, but also rejected the idea that this is the 'last cycle'. He concluded that the crypto market, with alternative investments and numerous new tokens, has become unpredictable in terms of where liquidity will end up.

sections.subtitle: Završne misli i poziv na daljnje praćenje
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj se zahvaljuje Filipu Šaravanjii poziva gledatelje na interakciju i praćenje Cryptoverse.hr.
sections.content: Na kraju intervjua, voditelj se zahvalio **Filipu Šaravanji** na iscrpnom i zanimljivom razgovoru. Pozvao je gledatelje da podrže kanal lajkom, komentarom i pretplatom, te da prate Cryptoverse.hr na društvenim mrežama i portalu za daljnje informacije iz svijeta kriptovaluta.
sections.subtitle_en: Concluding thoughts and call to further following
sections.screenshot_description_en: The host thanks Filip Šaravanja and invites viewers to interaction and following Cryptoverse.hr.
sections.content_en: At the end of the interview, the host thanked **Filip Šaravanja** for the exhaustive and interesting conversation. He invited viewers to support the channel with a like, comment, and subscription, and to follow Cryptoverse.hr on social networks and the portal for further information from the world of cryptocurrencies.

iterations.theme_en: Trump's influence on crypto, regulatory landscape and market dynamics
